items.title: [负面] Came to play the game because I heard it's great a...
items.summary:
Came to play the game because I heard it's great and it's now "localized".
The game is beautiful, the start mission is fun to play. But I can't get past the AI generated translation. 
Localization is not translation, there is more adaptation to it. Why not wait to have one or two solid languages localization human made ? AI generated is unethical, doesn't do a proper job, unecological, etc (there is enough ressources online to point all the warm it's doing).

items.title: [负面] Many things to improve, mainly making the characte...
items.summary:
Many things to improve, mainly making the character designs higher quality but overall a great game.

Biggest con was the translation but they've already fixed it.
Biggest pro is how fun the actual gameplay is. It's literally gacha Slay the Spire.

Small tip for beginners don't stress over standard units this game will drown you in pulls and even selectors, you'll have them all soon enough. Easiest teams to build early on is full blue or mix blue/red (more fun imo).

Anyone wondering how the rates are basically every 30 pulls guarantees a SSR but only the 3th SSR guarantees the rate up so hard pity is at 90 but on average it'll be around 60.

Update : Just reached 5-14 and apparently endgame turns the game into a hardcore grind where you need to waste hours on each stage hoping to get the perfect rng relics. First 4 chapters were awesome but dev decided to turn the game p2w for endgame, such bullsh*t.
